reviews.comment:
Espacios verdes y juegos infantiles para distenderse de un viaje. Gran gastronomia en su muy lindo restaurant. Personal amable y de gran experiencia

(Translated by Google)
Green spaces and children's play areas to relax after a trip. Excellent cuisine in their lovely restaurant. Friendly and experienced staff.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHekpPWUNnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención precios acordes hamburguesas riquísimas

(Translated by Google)
Very good service, reasonable prices, delicious burgers
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHOUw2YzZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Hay horarios dónde hay mucho público, la atención es buena. Hay árboles para descansar a la sombra

(Translated by Google)
There are times when it's very busy, but the service is good. There are trees where you can rest in the shade.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNHMk5hQmJREAE

reviews.comment:
Excelente ateatenc. Habitación cómoda con todo lo necesario para descansar luego de un largo viaje. La ducha muy buena. Volvería.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Comfortable room with everything needed to rest after a long trip. The shower was very good. I would return.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2X2YzdEF3EAE

reviews.comment:
Es cómodo, agradable. Deberían rever el tema del horario del comedor y poner mas gente, un solo mozo no puede atender 12 mesas que por el horario acotado terminas comiendo lo que ellos quieren.
Para una noche de paso al destino final está bien

(Translated by Google)
It's comfortable and pleasant. They should reconsider the dining room hours and hire more staff; one waiter can't handle 12 tables, and with such limited hours, you end up eating whatever they want. It's fine for a one-night stopover on your way to your final destination.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2M1pPX1ZBEAE

reviews.comment:
Sin palabras como toda estación. Buena y recomendada

(Translated by Google)
Speechless, like every season. Excellent and highly recommended.

reviews.comment:
Un lugar donde cargar combustible con los beneficios de ser socios del  ACA o de YPF. Posee restaurante abierto en horarios habituales solamente  luego servicio de cafeteria .

(Translated by Google)
A place to refuel with the benefits of being an ACA or YPF member. It has a restaurant open during regular hours only, followed by a cafeteria.

reviews.comment:

Felicitaciones!!

Very nice place, good sandwiches and very friendly service. Congratulations!

reviews.comment:
El lugar limpio la comida buena la atención de terror sobre todo en el restauran pensé que el camarero me iva a pegar luego de averme tratado de muy mala gana
Luego de conducir 7 hs lo mínimo sería que te traten bien

(Translated by Google)
The place was clean, the food was good, the service was terrifying, especially in the restaurant. I thought the waiter was going to hit me after treating me so rudely.
After driving for 7 hours, the least they could do would be to treat you well.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/235504011442524275/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUQ2aXVPcHVRRRAB

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
